title: Survey Insights and Metrics Scorecard Development
Dashboard for Project status
description:
Project Status Dashboard.

I run a tax business that needs a simplified dashboard to view project status in our pipeline.  I receive Excel data extracts via email from our CRM platform weekly that I would like to automatically load into the dashboard.  There are 7 files each week.  The file name is the protect type and date stamp.  One addresses the projects assigned to staff and 6 are for each type of project and the count in each pipeline.  I will need a spreadsheet created where I can load historical data for the Dashboard to reference for historical data.  The one file that holds staff project data will need to be matched to a set goal, how many projects away from that goal and how many projects are required to hit that goal by 4/15 each year.  I would like the files to download via a power automate flow to a sharepoint file weekly and be extracted from that sharepoint file.  I have played with the mechanics, put have been unsuccessful.  I also have the design of how I would like the visualization to present.

title: Power BI Developer Needed for Report Transformation to Visualizations
description: We are seeking a dynamic and detail-oriented Power BI Developer to join our innovative team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for transforming raw data into insightful and visually engaging reports and dashboards that drive strategic decision-making within our organization. As a Power BI Developer, you will work closely with cross-functional teams, including data analysts and business stakeholders, to understand their reporting needs and translate them into effective visualizations. Your expertise in data modeling, DAX queries, and ETL processes will be invaluable in creating interactive reports that are not only informative but also user-friendly. This role requires a keen analytical mindset and a passion for data storytelling. You will have the opportunity to work with large datasets and complex data structures while ensuring that our reporting systems are resilient and scalable. A successful Power BI Developer will engage in continuous improvement of reporting processes, ensuring that our data visualizations remain cutting-edge and aligned with industry best practices. Join us in harnessing the power of data to propel our business strategies forward and make data-driven decisions that lead to impactful results.

title: Aesthetic Excel KPI Dashboard Designer Needed
description: We are seeking a skilled designer to create aesthetic KPI dashboards for our business. The ideal candidate will have experience in designing visually appealing and functional dashboards that effectively communicate key performance indicators.
